claims: Deterministic Mission publication planning is implemented.
The compiler is read-only and grants no mutation or permanence authority.
One-branch, one-commit, one-draft-PR execution remains an adapter responsibility.
Duplicate, unsafe path, protected-looking content, and incomplete receipt inputs fail closed.
next_safe_action: Open one draft PR, run hosted and exact-head validation, reconcile review, and stop on Aegis failure.
